THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLINARD, ELIZABETH DIANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARDENAS, ROGER D.B.A. BAY AREA CAB. CO.
